title: Goga Lab RT-qPCR protocol: QuantStudio6 Machine
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"55h1","text":"Guidelines for preparing RT-qPCR samples for QuantStudio 6 located in HSW7 lab space.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"e2qjt","text":"*start with full tip boxes and use tips in coordination with your plate map, so you never get lost","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bb08d","text":"*watch 1uL volumes in the pipet tip like a hawk - major source of variability","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6v5ne","text":"*cap and gently vortex your *mixture per primer set* every 12 replicates or so, sometimes things separate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"4otpu","text":"*Thaw on ice (leave time!) and keep all reagents on ice through preparation. Prepare the plate on ice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5lv66","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"41l47","text":"PowerUp SYBR Green Master Mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d8jfm","text":"Your generated cDNA samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fhb8u","text":"100uM single primer stocks","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dilute stock IDT primers to 100uM (see note in Guidelines).
Use 'GogaLab-RTqPCR-Preparation' Excel spreadsheet to input your sample number and calculate reagent volumes.
Mix *total reagent volumes required* (see spreadsheet, green) for DI and PowerUP

Mix your forward and reverse primer pairs together, to a final dilution of 10uM forward and 10uM reverse. For example, add 10uL each of forward and reverse primers to 80uL PCR-quality DI for 100uL final volume.
Mix *mixtures per primer set* (blue) volumes together.
Pipet 1uL diluted cDNA into respective qPCR well, aiming for the sidewall of each respective well.
Add 19uL *mixture per primer set* into each respective well.
Seal plate, and spin down 1000rpm for 1 minute. Use bacterial, not tissue culture, centrifuge.
Load plate into centrifuge and proceed using QuantStudio software suite.
creator: Jeremy.williams
